title: RYAM and Verso Energy Sign New MoU to Advance e-SAF and COâ‚‚ Utilization Project in Jesup, Georgia
content: Rayonier Advanced Materials Inc., the global leader in High Purity Cellulose, and Verso Energy announced the signing of a new Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to deepen their strategic collaboration. The agreement represents a major step forward in evaluating the development of a breakthrough facility in Jesup, Georgia, to produce electro Sustainable Aviation Fuel (e-SAF) and valorize biogenic carbon dioxide from RYAMâ€™s manufacturing operations.
author: Analysts Account
